name: Document Vault
description: Document storage and organization with folder navigation, preview, version history, expiration tracking, and sharing.
visual_brief: Three-panel layout: a folder tree sidebar on the left for navigation, a document list or grid in the center, and an optional preview pane on the right. Each document item shows a file-type icon, document name, upload date, file size, and status badges (active, expired, shared). Folder sidebar shows a nested tree of folders with expand/collapse controls. The grid preset displays documents as card tiles with thumbnail previews. Tenant preset filters by tenant and adds a tenant selector header. Version history is accessible via a timeline popover on each document.

responsive.mobile: Single-panel view — folder navigation becomes a top dropdown or drawer. Document list takes full width as cards. Preview opens as a full-screen overlay.
responsive.tablet: Two-panel layout — sidebar and document list. Preview opens as a slide-over.
responsive.desktop: Full three-panel layout with resizable sidebar. Preview pane docked on the right.
